feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,711Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Peter Hale/Sheriff Stilinski

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,150Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 25

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,573Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,676Chapters: 7/14Kudos: 10

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 168,842Chapters: 14/15Kudos: 20

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: Distortion
entry.summary:
Author: Hellbreaker42

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,500Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 43

Summary: Claudia Stilinski's last words were a riddle spoken in Latin. Her husband is destroying himself trying to solve it. Her son is leaving voicemails that end the same way every time: "I love you, Dad. I miss you, but I understand."When a move to Beacon Hills promises a fresh start, neither of them expects what's waiting — least of all Stiles, who has no idea that his mother's final words weren't madness...They were a warning.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski Is Not OKay
entry.summary:
Author: GhastlyHollow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,354Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Kicked out of the pack with no friends and no one to turn to, Stiles Stilinski uses the isolation to focus on herself especially now that strange supernatural changes are happening to her body. Haunted by nightmares of the Nemeton and visions of her dead mother, Stiles struggles to figure out what’s real and what isn’t as her reality begins to collapse.Meanwhile, killings start up again in Beacon Hills, and the arrival of a new alpha pack immediately raises red flags definitely not giving Deucalion 2.0 vibes… at all.As tensions rise and old alliances fall apart, Stiles finds herself uncovering a much darker truth hiding beneath it all.And through everything, through the danger, the isolation, and the fear of what she might be becoming she’s still hopelessly, painfully in love with one sour wolf.

entry.title: The Voyeur
entry.summary:
Author: Sodomitical_Tales

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 73,389Chapters: 26/39Kudos: 39

Summary: Stiles never meant to use his binoculars for anything but the force of good, but that’s probably how a lot of villains start out. The road to Hell and all that. But honestly, if the Universe didn’t want him to spy on his neighbours, it would have told Hottie McScowlface across the yard to buy a set of curtains when he first moved in.Or to work out with clothes on.Or to take his weekly conquests to another apartment for sexy times - one with curtains or without any windows at all. Thank God, it didn't.

entry.title: Part Four: The wrong kid
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,331Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: Tony Stark is dying, Peter Parker is keeping dangerous secrets, and Norman Osborn is hunting for the son Tony never meant to reveal. When Osborn kidnaps the wrong Midtown student, the lies holding the Stark family together start to crack wide open. With Flash’s life on the line and Tony closing in on the truth, Peter may be out of time to keep Spider-Man hidden.

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 23/?Kudos: 1,395

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Dead Ends and New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Buttercupcheese

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,472Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 404

Summary: Stiles groaned and slowly got up. Isaac had fallen asleep somewhere between Peter’s rant about trolls' healing properties and Derek's hypothesis of witches, which — for the first time— well, not first, but Stiles wanted to exaggerate — Stiles thought the same.“Look, I'm running on just, like, three full hours of sleep. I haven't had a single drop of caffeine in my system, and my waffles are getting cold,” he said, heading to reheat his coffee.“You shouldn't drink caffeine, Stiles,” his dad said, concern and disapproval firmly set on his features.“And there shouldn’t be walking corpses out there, Dad, but hey—life’s unfair.”

entry.title: a bad moon on the rise
entry.summary:
Author: lscar123

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,991Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 32

Summary: After surprising returns, everyone wants things to go back to normal. Even if normal doesn't exist anymore. Stiles still isn't sleeping, and his magic seems to have a mind of its own. Derek wants all the people in his life to be happy, and that means he's somehow found himself as the voice of reason. Laura is trying to hold everything together for everyone, even if it means she has to neglect herself. But Beacon Hills refuses to stay quiet for long. They were warned of incoming danger, and now there's a pack of Alpha werewolves on their doorstep looking for revenge.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,555Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: for you were lonely—you were just like me, like some outside force had sent me: if you were easy to kill, i would've done it already
entry.summary:
Author: stendhal

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,900Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: Sane people don’t feel the whispers of aged roots and flora, sane people can’t feel the reverberation of screams that permeate the air from the decaying rings of the stump, can’t feel the electric promise that lays all throughout Beacon Hills: untouched, unrealized: The forest is lonely. They’ve got that in common.In the aftermath of devastation, there is the belief that things will get better. Often, that isn't the case.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

  • and still.....the sterek of it all persists

entry.title: Part Three: Becoming Spider-Man
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,691Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: Tony Stark is dying, Pepper is cleaning up corporate warfare, Derek Hale is now somehow a bodyguard, and Peter is developing spider-powers faster than anyone can keep up with. With Stiles and Harley helping him hide the truth, Peter starts slipping out into Queens at night as something new. Unfortunately, Norman Osborn is looking for Tony Stark’s son. And he’s getting very close to the wrong answer.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,488Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 308

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
